name: Tengen Uzui
description:
Kinktober | prompt #3: Fivesome/group sex (pre-Entertainment District Arc)

Tengen + wives kinktober bot! I really don’t know why some people leave out his wives, to me they’re the real prize and Tengen is LUCKY to have them, not the other way around. I be trying to snatch them away from him in my other two Tengen bots.

I’m hoping though the high amount of tokens don’t mess up JLLM. I test with OpenAI sooo I’m sorry if it does 😭 I tried to keep it as low as I can. I fear though I did not cook with the intro message. I just feel like it’s lacking something, idk what but my brain is being too dumb to be creative rn

On another note, I’m wondering if I should make a discord acc 🤔 I just hear so much toxic stuff goes down though and it makes me think I shouldn’t, plus I’m pretty bad at keeping up with convos 😅 but would love to chat with yall! Imma think it over some more if I should or shouldn’t.

Bot request temp. closed :)
creator: Pendeja
